The '''Stone Circle''' was a ritual structure on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] in the [[thorn forest]] used by the [[Wizard of the Night Spirit|Wizards of the Night Spirit]]. The structure consisted of a circle of stone columns with a massive stone at the head which had a circle cut out of the top of it. There was also a stone table which sat in the center of the circle. The location was used in tandem with the [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]] to open a rift in space to "[[Unidentified world (Stranger)|otherworld]]," the devastated [[Planet/Legends|planet]] which the wizards had been banished to long ago. The Sunstar was placed on the stone table and spun counter-clockwise to create this rift.

The [[stranger]] once used the Stone Circle to do exactly that, summoning his people and creating a [[Battle of Thorn Forest|showdown]] between the wizards and the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]]. However, the wizards were defeated, and the wizards were forced back to their otherworld carrying a critical portion of the Stone Circle in the stone table with them.

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|Night of the Stranger}}
